Bilingual Layouts

DW
“

DeckWeaver 让图片重新变得可编辑。

Makes flattened images editable again.

— Project README, 2026
📸 Source slide
📑 Reconstructed PPTX

适用场景

  • Agent 工作流：直接调用 skill
  • 大批量识别：命令行无 token 消耗
  • 内部知识库：把图片归档重新可搜

Use Cases

  • Slide regeneration in AI agents
  • Bulk OCR pipelines (no API cost)
  • Re-editing legacy slide screenshots
